landing_title: AI governance built for law firms
landing_description: SentinelLaw helps firms use AI confidently by enforcing firm policies, monitoring confidential data exposure, and maintaining a defensible audit trail.
landing_highlights: Enforce firm AI rules across drafting and review tools.
Monitor confidential data exposure and legal workflow risks.
Maintain an exportable audit trail for every AI interaction by user, matter, and practice group.
trial_description: Send your details and we will follow up to set up a legal demo environment.
